    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_04t2lo9" name="Template" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">

      <script><![CDATA[try{ 
	var isAlive = true;
	var errorCode = '0';
	var errorMessage = '';
	
	execution.setVariable("showToast",false);
	execution.setVariable("toastMessage", '');

	var jsonTemplate = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('template'));

       execution.setVariable('b2wEndpoint', jsonTemplate.b2wEndpoint);
	execution.setVariable("odooEndpoint", jsonTemplate.odooEndpoint);
	var accessToken =  execution.getVariable('X-Auth-Request-Access-Token');
    
	if(!accessToken){
		var request = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('request'));
		accessToken = request['X-Auth-Request-Access-Token'];
	}

	execution.setVariable('token', accessToken);
	execution.setVariable("odooEndpoint", jsonTemplate.odooEndpoint);
        
        var today = new Date();
        var now = today.toLocaleDateString('en-US');
	execution.setVariable('dateToday', now);
	
	
	
	var options;
	
	if (commodity === 'pod') {
        	options = [
            		{ text: 'M01', value: 'M01' },
            		{ text: 'M02', value: 'M02' },
            		{ text: 'M03', value: 'M03' },
        	];
        } else if (commodity === 'pdr') {
        	options = [
            	{ text: 'MG01', value: 'MG01' },
            	{ text: 'MG02', value: 'MG02' },
        	];
    	} else {
                isAlive = false
        	errorCode = 'INVALID_COMMODITY';
	        errorMessage = 'Commodity neither pod nor pdr';
    	}
	
	execution.setVariable("options",JSON.stringify(options));

        client_request_types = [
		{
			"value": "written_complaint",
			"text": "Reclamo Scritto"
		},
		{
			"value": "written_info_request",
			"text": "Richiesta Scritta di Informazioni"

	]
	execution.setVariable("client_request_types",JSON.stringify(client_request_types));

         var boolean_options = [
		{
			"value": "yes",
			"text": "SÌ"
		},
		{

	];

	complaint_categories = [

	execution.setVariable("complaint_categories",JSON.stringify(complaint_categories));
	
	flow_types = [

		},

		},
		{

		},

		},
		{

			"text": "RFO2G"
		}
	]
	execution.setVariable("flow_types",JSON.stringify(flow_types));
	
	var missing_data_reasons = [
		{
			"value": "1",
			"text": "Errato Cliente Finale"
		},
		{

	execution.setVariable("missing_data_reasons",JSON.stringify(missing_data_reasons));

        execution.setVariable('isAlive', isAlive);
	execution.setVariable('errorCode', errorCode);
	execution.setVariable('errorMessage', errorMessage);


}catch(err){ 
	execution.setVariable("isAlive",false);
	execution.setVariable('errorCode','TEMPLATE_FAILED');
	execution.setVariable('errorMessage',err.message);
}]]></script>

    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_0m5kdwj" name="Prep Save" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_0v7ifzr</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1odl6e2</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try {
    // ----------------------------
    // Input gathering
    // ----------------------------

    var cod_servizio = execution.getVariable('cod_servizio');

    var case_id = execution.getVariable('case_id');

    // ----------------------------
    // Output variable initialization
    // ----------------------------

    var kv_body = null;

    // ----------------------------
    // Main Execution
    // ----------------------------

    kv_body = {
        ticket_id: case_id,
        method: 'set_many',
        args: [
            {
                cod_servizio: execution.getVariable('cod_servizio', false),
                request_date: execution.getVariable('request_date', false),

                client_request_type: execution.getVariable(
                    'TIPO_RICH_CL_FINALE',
                    false
                ),
                is_new_attempt: execution.getVariable('NUOVO_TENTATIVO', false),

                reading_type: execution.getVariable('TIPOLOGIA_LETTURA', false),

                request_type: execution.getVariable('RICH_UTENTE', false),
                category: execution.getVariable('CATEGORIA', false),
                is_complete_correct: execution.getVariable(
                    'CORRETTEZZA_COMPLETEZZA',
                    false
                ),
                additional_data: execution.getVariable('ELENCO_DATI', false),
                required_technical_data: execution.getVariable(
                    'DATI_TEC_RIC',
                    false
                ),

                active_reading_f1: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_LETTURA_ATTIVA_F1',
                    false
                ),
                active_reading_f2: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_LETTURA_ATTIVA_F2',
                    false
                ),
                active_reading_f3: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_LETTURA_ATTIVA_F3',
                    false
                ),

                reactive_reading_f1: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_LETTURA_REATTIVA_F1',
                    false
                ),
                reactive_reading_f2: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_LETTURA_REATTIVA_F2',
                    false
                ),
                reactive_reading_f3: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_LETTURA_REATTIVA_F3',
                    false
                ),

                power_reading_f1: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_LETTURA_POTENZA_F1',
                    false
                ),
                power_reading_f2: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_LETTURA_POTENZA_F2',
                    false
                ),
                power_reading_f3: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_LETTURA_POTENZA_F3',
                    false
                ),

                lc_reading_date: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_DATA_LETTURA',
                    false
                ),
                lec_reading_date: execution.getVariable(
                    'LEC_DATA_LETTURA',
                    false
                ),

                is_client_present: execution.getVariable(
                    'LC_PRESENZA_CLIENTE',
                    false
                ),

                lec_active_reading_f1: execution.getVariable(
                    'LEC_LETTURA_ATTIVA_F1',
                    false
                ),
                lec_active_reading_f2: execution.getVariable(
                    'LEC_LETTURA_ATTIVA_F2',
                    false
                ),
                lec_active_reading_f3: execution.getVariable(
                    'LEC_LETTURA_ATTIVA_F3',
                    false
                ),

                lec_reactive_reading_f1: execution.getVariable(
                    'LEC_LETTURA_REATTIVA_F1',
                    false
                ),
                lec_reactive_reading_f2: execution.getVariable(
                    'LEC_LETTURA_REATTIVA_F2',
                    false
                ),
                lec_reactive_reading_f3: execution.getVariable(
                    'LEC_LETTURA_REATTIVA_F3',
                    false
                ),

                lec_power_reading_f1: execution.getVariable(
                    'LEC_LETTURA_POTENZA_F1',
                    false
                ),
                lec_power_reading_f2: execution.getVariable(
                    'LEC_LETTURA_POTENZA_F2',
                    false
                ),
                lec_power_reading_f3: execution.getVariable(
                    'LEC_LETTURA_POTENZA_F3',
                    false
                ),

                complaint_reference: execution.getVariable(
                    'RIF_RECLAMO',
                    false
                ),
                univocal_complaint_reference: execution.getVariable(
                    'RIF_QUESITI',
                    false
                ),
                customer_complaint_category: execution.getVariable(
                    'CATEGORIA_RECLAMO_CLIENTE',
                    false
                ),
                reference_id: execution.getVariable('ID_RIFERIMENTO', false),
                invoice_number: execution.getVariable('NUMERO_FATTURA', false),
                complaint_reference: execution.getVariable(
                    'RIF_RECLAMO',
                    false
                ),
                request_start_date: execution.getVariable(
                    'DATA_DECORRENZA_DA',
                    false
                ),
                request_end_date: execution.getVariable(
                    'DATA_DECORRENZA_A',
                    false
                ),
                verification_number: execution.getVariable(
                    'ID_VERIFICA',
                    false
                ),
                final_client_code: execution.getVariable(
                    'COD_RICH_CLI_FIN',
                    false
                ),
                segn_mis: execution.getVariable('SEGN_MIS', false),
                segn_cliente: execution.getVariable('SEGN_CLIENTE', false),
                reading_date: execution.getVariable('DATA_LETTURA', false),
                customer_reading_date: execution.getVariable(
                    'DATA_LETTURA_CLIENTE',
                    false
                ),

                competence_date: execution.getVariable(
                    'DATA_COMPETENZA',
                    false
                ),

                is_appointment: execution.getVariable('APPUNTAMENTO', false),

                notes: execution.getVariable('notes', false),

                request_flow_type: execution.getVariable(
                    'TIPOLOGIA_FLUSSO',
                    false
                ),
                missing_data: execution.getVariable(
                    'DATI_ERRATI_MANCANTI',
                    false
                ),
            },
        ],
    };

    // ----------------------------
    // Output
    // ----------------------------

    execution.setVariable('kv_body', JSON.stringify(kv_body));
} catch (err) {
    execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
    execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'PREP_SAVE_FAIL');
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}
]]></script>
    </scriptTask>
    <sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_1odl6e2" sourceRef="ScriptTask_0m5kdwj" targetRef="ExclusiveGateway_0wehh2t"/>
    <serviceTask id="ServiceTask_1f91j11" name="Save" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:class="com.symphony.action.CallDelegate">
      <extensionElements>
        <activiti:field name="endpoint">
          <activiti:expression><![CDATA[${odooEndpoint}helpdesk.ticket/kv_store]]></activiti:expression>
        </activiti:field>
        <activiti:field name="method">
          <activiti:string><![CDATA[POST]]></activiti:string>
        </activiti:field>
        <activiti:field name="headers">
          <activiti:expression><![CDATA[[{'Authorization': 'Bearer ${token}'}, {'Content-Type':'application/json'}]]]></activiti:expression>
        </activiti:field>
        <activiti:field name="body">
          <activiti:expression><![CDATA[${kv_body}]]></activiti:expression>
        </activiti:field>
        <activiti:field name="resultKey">
          <activiti:string><![CDATA[saveResponse]]></activiti:string>
        </activiti:field>
        <activiti:field name="retries">
          <activiti:string><![CDATA[3]]></activiti:string>
        </activiti:field>
        <activiti:field name="retryInterval">
          <activiti:string><![CDATA[5000]]></activiti:string>
        </activiti:field>
      </extensionElements>
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_0hxpt6w</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_0y2usx9</outgoing>
    </serviceTask>
    <sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_0y2usx9" sourceRef="ServiceTask_1f91j11" targetRef="ScriptTask_0rd5aoi"/>
    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_0rd5aoi" name="Check Save" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_0y2usx9</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_01pojd9</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try {
    // ----------------------------
    // Input gathering
    // ----------------------------

    var responseJson = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('saveResponse'));

    // ----------------------------
    // Main Execution
    // ----------------------------

    if (responseJson.code !== 200) {
        throw new Error('KV store failed');
    }
} catch (err) {
    execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
    execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'KV_STORE_SAVE_FAIL');
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}
]]></script>
    </scriptTask>

    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_1ozta67" name="Compose Error" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_1e7knao</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1xw5eit</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try{

	execution.setVariable
	var caseid = execution.getVariable('case_id');
	
	
	var notifyError = {
		"id": caseid,
		"error_message": execution.getVariable('errorMessage'),
		"process_instance_key": execution.getProcessInstanceId()
	}	

	execution.setVariable('notifyError',  JSON.stringify(notifyError));
	
	
}catch(err){
	var errorMessage = "PROCESS INTERNAL ERROR: " + err.message;	
	execution.setVariable('errorCodeNotifyingError', 'NOTIFY_ERROR_FAIL');
	execution.setVariable('errorMessageNotifyingError', errorMessage);
}]]></script>
    </scriptTask>
    <sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_1xw5eit" sourceRef="ScriptTask_1ozta67" targetRef="ServiceTask_0fda3ny"/>
    <serviceTask id="ServiceTask_0fda3ny" name="PUT Error" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:class="com.symphony.action.CallDelegate">
      <extensionElements>
        <activiti:field name="endpoint">
          <activiti:expression><![CDATA[${odooEndpoint}helpdesk.ticket/put_error_message]]></activiti:expression>
        </activiti:field>
        <activiti:field name="method">
          <activiti:string><![CDATA[PUT]]></activiti:string>
        </activiti:field>
        <activiti:field name="headers">
          <activiti:expression><![CDATA[[{'Authorization': 'Bearer ${token}'}, {'Content-Type':'application/json'}]]]></activiti:expression>
        </activiti:field>
        <activiti:field name="body">
          <activiti:expression><![CDATA[${notifyError}]]></activiti:expression>
        </activiti:field>
        <activiti:field name="resultKey">
          <activiti:string><![CDATA[notifyErrorResponse]]></activiti:string>

    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_103ttej" name="init selections" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_0hzu20u</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1sv4ogc</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try {
    // ----------------------------
    // Input gathering
    // ----------------------------

    // ----------------------------
    // Output variable initialization
    // ----------------------------

    var request_date = null;

    // ----------------------------
    // Logical Helpers
    // ----------------------------

    function pad(number, width, paddingCharacter) {
        paddingCharacter = paddingCharacter || '0';
        number = number + ''; // Convert to string
        return number.length >= width
            ? number
            : new Array(width - number.length + 1).join(paddingCharacter) +
                  number;
    }

    function formatDateES5(d) {
        var year = d.getFullYear();
        var month = d.getMonth() + 1; // Month is 0-indexed
        var day = d.getDate();

        var paddedMonth = pad(month, 2, '0');
        var paddedDay = pad(day, 2, '0');

        return year + '-' + paddedMonth + '-' + paddedDay;
    }

    // ----------------------------
    // Main Execution
    // ----------------------------

    request_date = formatDateES5(new Date());

    // ----------------------------
    // Output
    // ----------------------------

    execution.setVariable('request_date', request_date);
} catch (err) {
    execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
    execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'ERR_PREP_SELECTIONS');
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}
]]></script>
    </scriptTask>

    </sequenceFlow>
